title: ErrorPayload
description: Error details referenced by server_error.data. Current server implementation (internal/hub/hub.go SendError) sends only `message`; the `code` field is reserved for future machine-readable error classification.

message.description: Human-readable error message. Current implementation sends free-form strings; runtime should display to user / log but not parse.

code.description: Reserved for future structured error codes. Not currently populated by server.

details.description: Reserved for future context. Not currently populated.
